prompt: Create a vibrant single-panel anime illustration of a young woman with shoulder-length honey-blonde hair shown from the waist up against a saturated clear blue summer sky with soft white cumulus clouds. She has a breezy chin-to-shoulder bob haircut with loose windblown strands, peachy skin, a slender neck and shoulders, and wears a loose white short-sleeve T-shirt with a wide neckline slipping slightly off one shoulder. Compose her slightly leaning forward in a relaxed casual pose, cropped close like a portrait poster. Place a plain peach-colored rectangular block over the center of her face, obscuring all facial features. Use a clean modern Japanese anime style with expressive sketchy navy and cyan linework, warm peach and cream shading, bright sunlight, airy highlights on the hair, minimal background detail, crisp high-contrast colors, and a cheerful summer atmosphere.
